metadata.description: Production-grade design system with 9 structural palettes, 600 W3C DTCG tokens, 43 BEM components, BM25 reasoning engine, WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, and industry-specific design rules. Reverse-engineered from 100 modern websites.

plugins.name: universal-design-system
plugins.description: AI-native design system that reasons about your product. 9 switchable palettes, 600 design tokens, 43 accessible components, BM25 search engine across 20 databases, 190 industry rules, and automated WCAG validation. Other tools tell AI what colors to use — we give it a complete, accessible, WCAG-validated design system it can ship.
